response.text:
ACCEPT
rationale: r2c3's SoC is 0.10 below our balanced sharing threshold of 0.3, the request is modest (0.5 kWh), and our policy supports geographic circle sharing at normal urgency while maintaining our survival margin.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Four neighbors are in critical condition (SoC 0.10) and requesting urgent help, but r0c3 and r2c3 reject all offers due to their own conservative thresholds; I will remain available to help via geographic circle while preserving my own survival margin..
